{{Quote|Give me a second while I check with someone.|Gotspar|<ref name="Tapani Sector Instant Adventures">{{WEGCite|story=The Mecetti File|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}}</ref>}}
'''Gotspar''' was a [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] who worked as a bartender at the [[Green Mist]] Tavern on [[Lamuir IV]]. For the right price he was also an [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Mecetti File|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}} {{1st}}
